title: CBW MI ↔ GEO ↔ Deep Passport Binding
description: Records the single canonical binding between the Market Intelligence country×exchange cell (future canonical decision record), the existing frozen GEO passport (legacy production truth), and the Country×Exchange Deep Passport renderer. There must be exactly one binding per (exchangeId, countryCode) so no two competing availability truth records exist. This schema authorizes no data, ranking, page, route, or deploy change.

canonicalRecord.description: The single source of availability truth for this pair. MI cell is canonical going forward; GEO_LEGACY only while a pair has not yet migrated.

miCellRef.description: Reference to the exchange-market-cell (schemas/market-intelligence/exchange-market-cell.schema.json). Canonical normalized decision record.

legacyGeoPassportRef.description: Reference to the existing frozen GEO passport (schemas/geo/exchange-geo-passport.schema.json) where one exists. Read-only input; never overwritten by this binding.

deepPassportRef.description: Reference to the Deep Passport render record (schemas/country-exchange/country-exchange-deep-passport.schema.json). Consumer only; must NOT hold an independent availability record.

migrationPhase.description: MIGRATION_0 docs/schemas · 1 read-only adapter · 2 shadow compare · 3 discrepancy report · 4 owner approval · 5 ranking integration · 6 noindex Deep Passport pilot · 7 production activation. No phase skips owner approval.

ownership.description: Which system OWNS each field. Exactly one owner per field — prevents two competing truth records.

eligibility.description: Separate eligibility fields. Availability, ranking, CTA and promo are distinct and never collapsed; affiliate value must never influence ranking.

affiliateInfluencesRanking.description: Invariant: affiliate value never affects ranking.

evidencePrecedence.description: Ordered tiers, strongest first. Regulator/sanctions and official exchange/product/fee pages outrank news; community never establishes a critical claim alone.

conflictResolution.description: How a GEO-vs-MI or source-vs-source disagreement is handled. Never resolves toward the commercially convenient answer; never changes production automatically.

productionRouteUnchanged.description: Existing production route must remain stable during any conflict.

liveVerificationState.description: NO-PROXY mode: proxy/VPN/live-IP bypass is never required; absence stays visible as NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED.

productionStable.description: This binding never changes existing production behavior; existing GEO records and routes remain frozen until MIGRATION_7 owner approval.

owner.description: Owning system for a field. MI = Market Intelligence cell (canonical). GEO_LEGACY = existing frozen six-exchange GEO passport (read-only input).
